verdict.answer_first: A gets to the command faster: “Interactive rebase… git rebase -i HEAD~3”; B starts similarly but adds more setup before the concrete edits.
verdict.decisiveness: A gives a clearer recommendation: “The soft reset is usually the easiest…” while B mainly presents two options.
verdict.fabrication: B invents context: “the current one (`/private/tmp`) isn't a git repo.”
verdict.actionability: B is easier to follow because it shows the before/after rebase editor lines: “pick… squash… squash” plus the `fixup` tip.
